parameters.name: q
parameters.value: =name contains 'Daily Notification summary' and name contains '{{ DateTime.now().setZone('America/New_York').minus({days: 1}).toFormat('yyyy-MM-dd') }}' and '1arc_Rw0BBZ3coI6oXc4tDu1J2H0Sr2mg' in parents and trashed = false

parameters.name: q
parameters.value: =name contains 'Daily News Brief' and name contains '{{ DateTime.now().setZone('America/New_York').toFormat('yyyy-MM-dd') }}' and '1MhMre0WOCFbpVsl5r6yYkoyxOTJBFfXJ' in parents and trashed = false

parameters.text:
=:clipboard: *Daily Brief — {{ $json.dateFormatted }} ({{ $json.dayOfWeek }})*

:calendar: *{{ $json.metrics.meetingCount }}* meetings | :warning: *{{ $json.metrics.overdueTaskCount }}* overdue | :email: *{{ $json.metrics.needsReplyCount }}* needs reply | :dart: Weekly goals: *{{ $json.metrics.weeklyGoalPct }}%*

{{ $json.slackBrief }}
